title: GraphQL API is turned off temporarily

posts.author: mehmetkemdemir (Mehmet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We started to get error in “Search Items in the Board by Column Values” module on Make now. Do you know what could be the reason since we didn’t change anything recently. We need urgent help please.

  • [200] [{"message":"GraphQL API is turned off temporarily","locations":[{"line":1,"column":2}],"path":["items_page_by_column_values"]}]

image915×619 55.3 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: most likely related to monday.com Status - Investigating reports of connectivity issues across accounts

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mehmetkemdemir,

When were you getting this error? Are you still getting it?

We had a temporary outage this morning as @basdebruin mentioned, but that should be resolved. Let me know if you’re still experiencing issues!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @rachelatmonday

Can you please make sure we get a post mortem for this one?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @basdebruin,

The team just released a postmortem for the incident (see here)

Best,
